title: Il trattamento dei digestati zootecnici per ridurre le emissioni e recuperare struvite
description: A webinar presenting a virtual tour of a prototype system for treating livestock digestates to reduce greenhouse gas and ammonia emissions and recover struvite. It details each stage of the treatment line implemented at Società Agricola Colombaro in Formigine, including pre-separation, flotation, anaerobic digestion, and post-separation.
